message:
test(hash): add all-zero, all-ff, and all-256-values hex_encode fixtures (beads_rust-6d9t)

Add three targeted fixtures requested by beads_rust-6d9t:
- [0u8; 32]: verifies leading zeros are preserved at digest width
- [0xff; 32]: verifies high-bit byte repetition
- 0..=255: all 256 byte values compared against reference formatter

Combined with the hex_encode_roundtrip proptest (arbitrary Vec<u8> up
to 256 bytes), this provides exhaustive byte-pattern coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
